title: Tango Ice Blast
summary: A homemade version of everyone's favourite cinema slush. Our Tango Ice Blast recipe is even tastier than the real thing.

method.description: Pour each of the Tango flavours into ice cube trays or lolly moulds and freeze overnight.

Take the ice lollies off their sticks. Remove the Tango Apple ice cubes from tray or mould, then put into a processor with a few drops of blue food colouring, a handful of ice, and 1 of the ice lollies. Blitz, pour in a bit more apple tango to loosen it up, mix again, then transfer to the freezer.
Repeat the whole process with the Tango Cherry ice cubes.
Pour the blue tango ice blast into a glass and top with half of the sherbet. Pour over the cherry flavour and sprinkle with the remaining sherbet. Give it a little mix with a straw and get stuck in!

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
